en: Thanks for coming in. Thank you for having me. That's my resume. Oh, great.
ko: 와주셔서 감사합니다. 불러주셔서 감사해요. 제 이력서예요. 좋네요.

en: We're looking for someone who has a lot of experience in this work. I thought this was an entry-level position.
ko: 이 분야에 경험이 많은 분을 찾고 있어요. 신입 포지션인 줄 알았는데요.

en: Yes, well, experienced entry-level. Experienced is sort of implied. We're looking for someone who's really a team player, but can also work independently as well.
ko: 경험 있는 신입이요. 경험이 있다는 건 암묵적이죠. 팀플레이어인데 독립적으로도 일할 수 있는 분을 찾아요.

en: So it's really important that the person who fills this role is someone who has a lot of initiative, won't rock the boat, will shake things up, but takes a very cautious approach in making decisions, is a real risk taker, but plays by the rules.
ko: 주도적이지만 파도를 안 일으키고, 혁신적이지만 신중하고, 모험가이면서 규칙을 따르는 분이 필요해요.

en: We don't like to micromanage around here, but we do require hourly status updates. In fact, I just do it via video chat.
ko: 여기서는 마이크로매니징 안 하는데, 매시간 상태 업데이트는 필요해요. 저는 화상 통화로 해요.

en: I just keep it open. In fact, hey, Steve, how are you? Hey, how you doing? All right, we're doing the interview right now.
ko: 항상 켜놔요. 스티브, 잘 지내? 잘 있어? 지금 면접 중이야.

en: Just wanted to update you on that. Say hi to Steve. Steve. We're looking for someone who's confident, but not overly confident, innovative, but traditional, easy to work with, but with a bit of an edge.
ko: 알려주려고. 스티브한테 인사해. 스티브. 자신감 있되 과하지 않고, 혁신적이지만 전통적이고, 일하기 쉽지만 날이 좀 있는 분.

en: I think a reliable maverick is the best way I can sum up this position.
ko: 신뢰할 수 있는 이단아가 이 포지션을 가장 잘 요약하는 것 같아요.

en: This is indeed an experienced entry-level position, so the offer's gonna reflect that, but we do have a lot of great snacks in the kitchen.
ko: 경험자 신입 포지션이니 급여도 그에 맞게 나갈 거지만, 부엌에 간식이 엄청 많아요.
